title: nicotiana angustifolia var. parviflora
intro: Nicotiana angustifolia var. parviflora, also known as the Narrowleaf Tobacco or Mexican Tobacco, is a plant species in the nightshade family that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nicotiana angustiflora var. parviflora include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in smudging ceremonies to purify and cleanse the body and mind.
